mapper.select:
SELECT ID, ORDER_TYPE, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, APPROVED_BY, APPROVED_BY_NAME, APPROVED_TIME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, VOYAGE FROM T_BUS_ORDER
id = #{id}

SELECT tboi.BILL_NO "billNo", TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "cargoOwnerName", TBCI.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", TBOI.QUANTITY "quantity", TBOI.TON "ton" FROM T_BUS_ORDER_ITEM tboi LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci ON tbci.ID = TBOI.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE ORDER_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_ORDER(ID, ORDER_TYPE, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, STATUS, APPROVED_BY, APPROVED_BY_NAME, APPROVED_TIME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, VOYAGE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvedBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvedByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvedTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_ORDER SET ID = #{id}, ORDER_TYPE = #{orderType}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status}, APPROVED_BY = #{approvedBy}, APPROVED_BY_NAME = #{approvedByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, -- APPROVED_TIME = TO_DATE(#{approvedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss'), SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId}, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId}, SHIP_NAME = #{shipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOYAGE = #{voyage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- UPDATE_TIME = TO_DATE(#{now},'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss')
id = #{id}
